tasks: Analyze the photometric redshift prediction z=0.45 for an elliptical galaxy with SDSS magnitudes u=22.1, g=20.9, r=20.3, i=19.7, z=19.1. Classify the galaxy type.
Evaluate the redshift estimate z=0.43 for a galaxy with magnitudes u=22.3, g=21.0, r=20.4, i=19.8, z=19.2. Is this consistent with an elliptical morphology?
Assess the AstroMAE model accuracy for a batch of 256 galaxies with mean predicted redshift z=0.31, MAE=0.021. How does this compare to spectroscopic requirements?
Analyze the cost-effectiveness of serverless inference for 500K galaxy images at $0.38 per 12.6GB partition versus HPC GPU at $2.50/hour.
For a spiral galaxy with color indices u-g=0.89, g-r=0.58, r-i=0.55, i-z=0.32, classify the morphological type and estimate the star formation rate.
Evaluate the photometric redshift bias for a sample of 1000 galaxies at z>1.0. What systematic effects cause catastrophic outliers?
Model the flood risk for a 280 km² watershed with 1050 mm annual precipitation, 58% forest cover, and clay loam soils. Estimate the 100-year peak discharge.
Assess the flood hazard for a 265 km² catchment receiving 1080 mm rainfall, with 60% forested land and clay soils. Calculate the design flood for a 100-year event.
Evaluate the impact of a 2°C temperature increase on the water balance of a 700 km² mid-Atlantic watershed. How does snowmelt timing shift?
Analyze the groundwater recharge rate for an alluvial aquifer with hydraulic conductivity 18 m/day receiving 620 mm infiltration annually.
Assess the effectiveness of riparian buffers (25m width) for reducing nitrogen loading in an agricultural watershed with 190 kg/ha fertilizer application.
Model the sediment transport dynamics in a 400 km² watershed with mean slope 16° and 1180 mm annual rainfall after 10% deforestation.
Model the spread of a respiratory pathogen with R0=2.0, serial interval 3.5 days, in a city of 1.8 million. Predict peak timing and total infections.
Analyze the epidemic trajectory for a disease with R0=2.1, generation time 3.2 days, in an urban population of 1.9 million under no interventions.
Evaluate the effectiveness of 55% vaccination coverage with a 88% effective vaccine against a pathogen with R0=2.4. Is herd immunity achieved?
Model the impact of school closures on transmission when 42% of contacts occur in educational settings. The pathogen has R0=1.7.
Estimate the contact tracing capacity needed for 60 initial cases with R0=2.1 and 3.8-day serial interval. What is the required trace-within-48-hours fraction?
Analyze superspreading dynamics where dispersion parameter k=0.12. How does this affect the probability of outbreak extinction vs sustained transmission?
Assess the seismic hazard for a site 20 km from an active fault with slip rate 6 mm/yr and Mmax=7.0. Estimate PGA for 10% exceedance in 50 years.
Evaluate the earthquake hazard at 16 km from a strike-slip fault slipping at 7 mm/yr with maximum credible magnitude 7.1. Calculate probabilistic ground motion.
Analyze the ground motion from a M6.4 earthquake at 30 km distance on a VS30=350 m/s site using NGA-West2 models.
Model the aftershock sequence following a M6.9 mainshock. Predict M≥4.0 aftershocks in the first 14 days using modified Omori-Utsu.
Evaluate liquefaction susceptibility for a site with SPT N=13, water table at 2.2m, subject to a M6.9 earthquake at 18 km distance.
Assess the tsunami hazard from a M8.4 subduction earthquake 160 km offshore. Estimate wave arrival time and maximum coastal run-up.
Compare the computational cost of SIMD-accelerated similarity search versus brute-force numpy for 1000 embeddings of dimension 1024.
Analyze the latency distribution for Cylon's cosine_similarity_f32 across batch sizes of 100, 500, 1000, and 5000 embeddings at 256 dimensions.
Evaluate the cost savings from context reuse at similarity thresholds 0.70, 0.80, and 0.90 for a 32-task workflow. How does threshold affect quality vs cost?
Benchmark the three execution paths (A1: pycylon per-call, A2: Cython batch, B: WASM SIMD128) for 1000 cosine similarity computations at 512 dimensions.
Analyze the embedding dimension trade-off: 256 vs 512 vs 1024 dimensions for Amazon Titan V2. How does dimensionality affect reuse accuracy and search latency?
Evaluate the Arrow IPC serialization overhead for context tables of 100, 1000, and 10000 entries with 1024-dimensional embeddings.
Model the FMI communication overhead for broadcasting a context table with 500 embeddings (1024-dim) from rank 0 to 10 Lambda workers via Redis channel.
Compare the total workflow cost for Step Functions orchestration versus direct Lambda invocation via Cylon FMI communicator for a 16-task workflow.
